# [08:07:08.080] chat: on-session-updated id=ses_33d619ed8ffeM7IJNc5B58iJO7
# [08:07:08.099] session.diff
:sse {"directory":"/Users/bytedance/Documents/opencode.el","payload":{"type":"session.diff","properties":{"sessionID":"ses_33d619ed8ffeM7IJNc5B58iJO7","diff":[{"file":"opencode-api.el","before":";;; opencode-api.el --- HTTP client layer for opencode.el -*- lexical-binding: t; -*-\n\n;; Copyright (C) 2025 opencode.el contributors\n;; SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\n\n;;; Commentary:\n\n;; Async and sync HTTP client for the OpenCode REST API.\n;; Uses built-in `url.el' for all HTTP operations.\n;; JSON serialization via native `json-parse-string' / `json-serialize' (Emacs 30).\n;;\n;; All JSON objects are parsed as plists (:object-type 'plist).\n;; All JSON arrays are parsed as vectors (:array-type 'array).\n\n;;; Code:\n\n(require 'url)\n(require 'url-http)\n(require 'json)\n(require 'opencode-log)\n(require 'opencode-util)\n\n(declare-function opencode-server-url \"opencode-server\" (&optional path))\n(declare-function opencode-server--url \"opencode-server\" (&optional path))\n(declare-function opencode-server-connected-p \"opencode-server\" ())\n(declare-function opencode-server--connected-p \"opencode-server\" ())\n\n(defvar opencode-default-directory)\n(defgroup opencode-api nil\n  \"OpenCode HTTP API client.\"\n  :group 'opencode\n  :prefix \"opencode-api-\")\n\n;;; --- Customization ---\n\n(defcustom opencode-api-directory nil\n  \"Override project directory for the X-OpenCode-Directory header.\nWhen nil, uses `opencode-default-directory' (set by `opencode-start')\nor falls back to `default-directory'.\"\n  :type '(choice (const :tag \"Use project directory\" nil)\n                 (directory :tag \"Fixed directory\"))\n  :group 'opencode-api)\n\n(defcustom opencode-api-timeout 30\n  \"HTTP request timeout in seconds.\"\n  :type 'integer\n  :group 'opencode-api)\n\n;;; --- Error condition ---\n\n(define-error 'opencode-api-error \"OpenCode API error\")\n\n(defun opencode-api--signal-error (status name message)\n  \"Signal an `opencode-api-error' with STATUS, NAME, and MESSAGE.\"\n  (signal 'opencode-api-error (list :status status :name name :message message)))\n\n;;; --- Sync cache+TTL macro ---\n\n(defmacro opencode--define-cache (cache-var cache-time-var\n                                  ttl-sym ttl-default\n                                  ensure-fn getter-fn\n                                  endpoint doc-noun error-prefix\n                                  &optional skip-defcustom)\n  \"Define a synchronous cache with TTL for ENDPOINT.\nCACHE-VAR and CACHE-TIME-VAR are the defvar symbols for cached data and\ntimestamp.  TTL-SYM names the TTL variable; when SKIP-DEFCUSTOM is nil a\ndefcustom with TTL-DEFAULT is generated, otherwise TTL-SYM is used as-is.\nENSURE-FN is the name of the ensure-cache function.\nGETTER-FN is the name of the getter function.\nENDPOINT is the API path string (e.g. \\\"/agent\\\").\nDOC-NOUN is a short description for docstrings (e.g. \\\"agent list\\\").\nERROR-PREFIX is the prefix for error messages (e.g. \\\"opencode-agent\\\").\"\n  (let ((ttl-doc (format \"Seconds before %s cache expires.\" doc-noun)))\n    `(progn\n       ;; --- cache variables ---\n       (defvar ,cache-var nil\n         ,(format \"Cached %s from GET %s.\" doc-noun endpoint))\n       (defvar ,cache-time-var nil\n         ,(format \"Float-time when %s cache was last populated.\" doc-noun))\n       ,@(unless skip-defcustom\n           `((defcustom ,ttl-sym ,ttl-default\n               ,ttl-doc\n               :type 'integer\n               :group 'opencode)))\n       ;; --- ensure + getter ---\n       (defun ,ensure-fn ()\n         ,(format \"Fetch %s if cache is nil or expired.\\nUpdates `%s' and\\n`%s'.\"\n                  doc-noun cache-var cache-time-var)\n         (let ((now (float-time)))\n           (when (or (null ,cache-var)\n                     (> (- now (or ,cache-time-var 0)) ,ttl-sym))\n             (condition-case err\n                 (let ((data (opencode-api-get-sync ,endpoint)))\n                   (setq ,cache-var data\n                         ,cache-time-var now))\n               (error\n                (message ,(format \"%s: failed to fetch %s: %%s\"\n                                  error-prefix doc-noun)\n                         (error-message-string err)))))))\n       (defun ,getter-fn ()\n         ,(format \"Return cached %s.\\nEnsures cache is populated first.\" doc-noun)\n         (,ensure-fn)\n         ,cache-var))))\n\n;;; --- JSON helpers ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--json-parse (string)\n  \"Parse JSON STRING to a plist.\nReturns nil if STRING is empty or nil.\"\n  (when (and string (not (string-empty-p (string-trim string))))\n    (opencode--json-parse string)))\n\n(defun opencode-api--json-serialize (object)\n  \"Serialize OBJECT (plist or vector) to a JSON string.\"\n  (json-serialize object))\n\n;;; --- URL construction ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--build-url (path &optional query-params)\n  \"Build a full URL from PATH and optional QUERY-PARAMS.\nPATH is appended to the server base URL.\nQUERY-PARAMS is an alist of (KEY . VALUE) pairs.\"\n  (let ((base (opencode-server--url path)))\n    (if query-params\n        (concat base\n                (if (string-search \"?\" base) \"&\" \"?\")\n                (url-build-query-string\n                 (mapcar (lambda (pair)\n                           (list (car pair) (cdr pair)))\n                         query-params)))\n      base)))\n\n;;; --- Header construction ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--build-headers (&optional extra-headers)\n  \"Build HTTP request headers.\nAlways includes Content-Type and Accept as JSON.\nIncludes X-OpenCode-Directory header.\nEXTRA-HEADERS is an alist of additional headers.\"\n  (let ((headers (list (cons \"Content-Type\" \"application/json\")\n                       (cons \"Accept\" \"application/json\"))))\n    ;; Add directory header - ensure we use absolute path\n    (let ((dir (or opencode-api-directory\n                   (and (boundp 'opencode-default-directory) opencode-default-directory)\n                   default-directory)))\n      (when dir\n        (let ((absolute-dir (directory-file-name (expand-file-name dir))))\n          (push (cons \"X-OpenCode-Directory\" absolute-dir) headers)\n          (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: using X-OpenCode-Directory=%s\" absolute-dir))))\n    ;; Merge extra headers\n    (when extra-headers\n      (dolist (h extra-headers)\n        (push h headers)))\n    headers))\n\n;;; --- Response parsing ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--parse-response-buffer ()\n  \"Parse HTTP response from current `url.el' response buffer.\nReturns a plist (:status STATUS :headers HEADERS :body BODY).\nBODY is the parsed JSON, or nil if empty/unparseable.\"\n  (goto-char (point-min))\n  (let ((status (url-http-parse-response))\n        (headers nil)\n        (body nil))\n    ;; Parse headers\n    (when (bound-and-true-p url-http-end-of-headers)\n      (save-excursion\n        (goto-char (point-min))\n        (while (re-search-forward \"^\\\\([^:]+\\\\): \\\\(.+\\\\)$\" url-http-end-of-headers t)\n          (push (cons (downcase (match-string 1)) (match-string 2)) headers)))\n      ;; Parse body\n      (goto-char url-http-end-of-headers)\n      (let ((body-str (string-trim\n                       (buffer-substring-no-properties (point) (point-max)))))\n        (condition-case nil\n            (setq body (opencode-api--json-parse body-str))\n          (error\n           ;; If JSON parse fails, keep raw string if non-empty\n           (unless (string-empty-p body-str)\n             (setq body body-str))))))\n    (list :status status :headers (nreverse headers) :body body)))\n\n;;; --- Error handling ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--handle-error (response)\n  \"Check RESPONSE for errors and signal if found.\nRESPONSE is a plist from `opencode-api--parse-response-buffer'.\nOpenCode errors have format: {:name \\\"ErrorName\\\" :data {:name ... :message ...}}\"\n  (let ((status (plist-get response :status))\n        (body (plist-get response :body)))\n    (when (and status (>= status 400))\n      (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: !!! ERROR status=%d raw-body=%S\" status body)\n      (let ((err-name \"UnknownError\")\n            (err-message (format \"HTTP %d\" status)))\n        ;; Try to extract OpenCode NamedError\n        (when (and (listp body) (plist-get body :name))\n          (setq err-name (plist-get body :name))\n          (let ((data (plist-get body :data)))\n            (when (and (listp data) (plist-get data :message))\n              (setq err-message (plist-get data :message)))))\n        (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: !!! signaling error name=%s message=%s\" err-name err-message)\n        (opencode-api--signal-error status err-name err-message)))))\n\n(defun opencode-api--debug-body (url body)\n  \"Format BODY for debug logging, omitting large responses.\nOmits body for /session/<id>/message and /agent endpoints\nwhose responses are too large for useful debug output.\"\n  (if (and url (or (string-match-p \"/session/[^/]+/message\" url)\n                   (string-match-p \"/agent\\\\(?:\\\\?\\\\|$\\\\)\" url)\n                   (string-match-p \"/session/[^/]+/diff\" url)))\n      \"[omitted]\"\n    (format \"%S\" body)))\n\n\n;;; --- Core request functions ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--request (method path &optional body callback headers query-params)\n  \"Make an HTTP request to the OpenCode API.\nMETHOD is \\\"GET\\\", \\\"POST\\\", \\\"PATCH\\\", or \\\"DELETE\\\".\nPATH is the API path (e.g., \\\"/session\\\").\nBODY is an optional plist to serialize as JSON.\nCALLBACK is called with the parsed response plist (:status :headers :body).\n  If nil, the request is synchronous and returns the response.\nHEADERS is an optional alist of extra headers.\nQUERY-PARAMS is an optional alist of (KEY . VALUE) pairs for URL query string.\"\n   (let* ((is-mutating (member method '(\"POST\" \"PATCH\" \"DELETE\")))\n         (serialized-body (when is-mutating\n                            (if body\n                                (opencode-api--json-serialize body)\n                              \"{}\")))\n         (url-request-method method)\n         (url-request-extra-headers (opencode-api--build-headers headers))\n         (url-request-data (when serialized-body\n                             (encode-coding-string serialized-body 'utf-8)))\n         (full-url (opencode-api--build-url path query-params)))\n     (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: >>> %s %s dir=%s\\nBody: %s\"\n              method full-url\n              (cdr (assoc \"X-OpenCode-Directory\" url-request-extra-headers))\n              (or serialized-body \"nil\"))\n    (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: >>> HEADERS: %S\" url-request-extra-headers)\n    (if callback\n        ;; Async — with timeout guard\n        (let* ((url-buf nil)\n               (timeout-timer\n                (run-with-timer\n                 opencode-api-timeout nil\n                 (lambda ()\n                   (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: <<< ASYNC TIMEOUT %s\" full-url)\n                   (when (and url-buf (buffer-live-p url-buf))\n                     (with-current-buffer url-buf\n                       ;; Kill the connection to trigger the callback with error\n                       (when-let ((proc (get-buffer-process (current-buffer))))\n                         (delete-process proc))))))))\n          (setq url-buf\n                (url-retrieve\n                 full-url\n                 (lambda (status cb url tmr)\n                   (cancel-timer tmr)\n                   (if (plist-get status :error)\n                       (let ((err (plist-get status :error)))\n                         (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: <<< ASYNC ERROR %s -> %S\" url err)\n                         (funcall cb (list :status 0\n                                           :headers nil\n                                           :body nil\n                                           :error err\n                                           :url url)))\n                     (let ((response (opencode-api--parse-response-buffer)))\n                      (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: <<< ASYNC %s -> status=%d body=%s\"\n                               url (plist-get response :status)\n                               (opencode-api--debug-body url (plist-get response :body)))\n                       (kill-buffer (current-buffer))\n                       (funcall cb response))))\n                 (list callback full-url timeout-timer)\n                 t\n                 nil)))\n      ;; Sync\n      (let ((buf (url-retrieve-synchronously\n                  full-url t nil opencode-api-timeout)))\n        (if buf\n            (unwind-protect\n                (with-current-buffer buf\n                  (let ((response (opencode-api--parse-response-buffer)))\n                    (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: <<< SYNC %s -> status=%d body=%s\"\n                             full-url (plist-get response :status)\n                             (opencode-api--debug-body full-url (plist-get response :body)))\n                    (opencode-api--handle-error response)\n                    response))\n              (kill-buffer buf))\n          (opencode-api--signal-error 0 \"ConnectionError\"\n                                      (format \"No response from %s\" full-url)))))))\n\n;;; --- Convenience wrappers (async, callback-based) ---\n\n(defun opencode-api-get (path callback &optional query-params)\n  \"GET PATH with optional QUERY-PARAMS, call CALLBACK with response.\"\n  (opencode-api--request \"GET\" path nil callback nil query-params))\n\n(defun opencode-api-post (path body callback)\n  \"POST BODY to PATH, call CALLBACK with response.\"\n  (opencode-api--request \"POST\" path body callback))\n\n(defun opencode-api-patch (path body callback)\n  \"PATCH BODY to PATH, call CALLBACK with response.\"\n  (opencode-api--request \"PATCH\" path body callback))\n\n(defun opencode-api-delete (path callback)\n  \"DELETE PATH, call CALLBACK with response.\"\n  (opencode-api--request \"DELETE\" path nil callback))\n\n;;; --- Synchronous convenience wrappers ---\n\n(defun opencode-api-get-sync (path &optional query-params)\n  \"Synchronous GET PATH with optional QUERY-PARAMS.\nReturns the response body (parsed JSON).\"\n  (plist-get (opencode-api--request \"GET\" path nil nil nil query-params) :body))\n\n(defun opencode-api-post-sync (path &optional body)\n  \"Synchronous POST BODY to PATH.\nReturns the response body (parsed JSON).\"\n  (plist-get (opencode-api--request \"POST\" path body) :body))\n\n;;; --- Agent/model state for prompt_async ---\n\n(defvar opencode-api--model-id nil\n  \"Current model ID for prompt_async requests.\")\n\n(defvar opencode-api--provider-id nil\n  \"Current provider ID for prompt_async requests.\")\n\n(declare-function opencode-agent--find-by-name \"opencode-agent\" (name))\n(declare-function opencode-agent--primary-agents \"opencode-agent\" ())\n(declare-function opencode-agent--ensure-cache \"opencode-agent\" ())\n\n(defun opencode-api--fetch-agent-info ()\n  \"Populate model/provider state from /config.\nSets `opencode-api--model-id' and `opencode-api--provider-id'.\nAlso ensures the agent cache is populated for downstream consumers.\"\n  (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: fetching model info...\")\n  (condition-case err\n      (progn\n        (opencode-agent--ensure-cache)\n        (let* ((config (opencode-api-get-sync \"/config\"))\n               (model-str (when config (plist-get config :model))))\n          (when (and model-str (string-match \"\\\\`\\\\(.+\\\\)/\\\\(.+\\\\)\\\\'\" model-str))\n            (setq opencode-api--provider-id (match-string 1 model-str)\n                  opencode-api--model-id (match-string 2 model-str))))\n        (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: model=%s provider=%s\"\n                 opencode-api--model-id opencode-api--provider-id))\n    (error\n     (message \"opencode-api: fetch-agent-info FAILED: %s\" (error-message-string err)))))\n\n(defun opencode-api--valid-agent-p (agent-name)\n  \"Return non-nil if AGENT-NAME is a valid agent known to the server.\nChecks against the agent cache.  If the cache is empty, ensures it first.\"\n  (opencode-agent--find-by-name agent-name))\n\n(defun opencode-api--prompt-body (text &optional agent model-id provider-id\n                                       variant mentions images message-id context)\n  \"Build the POST body for /session/:id/prompt_async.\nTEXT is the user's message text.\nAGENT, MODEL-ID, PROVIDER-ID, VARIANT are optional overrides.\nWhen nil, uses global defaults from opencode-api--*.\nMENTIONS is an optional list of mention plists, each with :type, :name,\n:path (for files), :start, and :end (positions in TEXT).\nWhen MENTIONS is non-nil, additional file/agent parts are included.\nWhen VARIANT is non-nil, includes :variant in output plist.\nIMAGES is an optional list of image plists, each with :data-url, :mime,\nand :filename.  When non-nil, file parts with data: URLs are appended\nafter text and mention parts.\nMESSAGE-ID is the optional parent message ID.\nCONTEXT is an optional plist with :filename and :selection.\nReturns a plist with :parts, :agent, :model, :variant, :messageID, :context.\"\n  (let* ((text-part (list :type \"text\" :text text :id (opencode-util--generate-id \"prt\")))\n         (mention-parts\n          (when mentions\n            (mapcar\n             (lambda (m)\n               (let ((mtype (plist-get m :type))\n                     (mname (plist-get m :name))\n                     (mpath (plist-get m :path))\n                     (mstart (plist-get m :start))\n                     (mend (plist-get m :end)))\n                 (pcase mtype\n                   ('file\n                    (list :type \"file\"\n                          :id (opencode-util--generate-id \"prt\")\n                          :mime \"text/plain\"\n                          :url (concat \"file://\" mpath)\n                          :filename mname\n                          :source (list :type \"file\"\n                                        :text (list :value (substring text mstart mend)\n                                                    :start mstart :end mend)\n                                        :path mpath)))\n                   ('agent\n                    (list :type \"agent\"\n                          :id (opencode-util--generate-id \"prt\")\n                          :name mname\n                          :source (list :value (substring text mstart mend)\n                                        :start mstart :end mend))))))\n             mentions)))\n         (image-parts (when images\n                        (mapcar\n                         (lambda (img)\n                           (list :type \"file\"\n                                 :id (opencode-util--generate-id \"prt\")\n                                 :mime (plist-get img :mime)\n                                 :url (plist-get img :data-url)\n                                 :filename (plist-get img :filename)))\n                         images)))\n         (all-parts (apply #'vector (cons text-part (append (or mention-parts nil) (or image-parts nil)))))\n         (body (list :parts all-parts)))\n    ;; Agent: caller must provide (via opencode-chat--effective-agent)\n    (when agent\n      (setq body (plist-put body :agent agent)))\n    ;; Use provided model/provider or fall back to global defaults\n    (let ((effective-model-id (or model-id opencode-api--model-id))\n          (effective-provider-id (or provider-id opencode-api--provider-id)))\n      (when (and effective-model-id effective-provider-id)\n        (setq body (plist-put body :model\n                              (list :modelID effective-model-id\n                                    :providerID effective-provider-id)))))\n    ;; Include variant only if non-nil\n    (when variant\n      (setq body (plist-put body :variant variant)))\n    ;; Include messageID (parent) only if non-nil\n    (when message-id\n      (setq body (plist-put body :messageID message-id)))\n    ;; Include context only if non-nil\n    (when context\n      (setq body (plist-put body :context context)))\n    body))\n\n(provide 'opencode-api)\n;;; opencode-api.el ends here\n","after":";;; opencode-api.el --- HTTP client layer for opencode.el -*- lexical-binding: t; -*-\n\n;; Copyright (C) 2025 opencode.el contributors\n;; SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\n\n;;; Commentary:\n\n;; Async and sync HTTP client for the OpenCode REST API.\n;; Uses built-in `url.el' for all HTTP operations.\n;; JSON serialization via native `json-parse-string' / `json-serialize' (Emacs 30).\n;;\n;; All JSON objects are parsed as plists (:object-type 'plist).\n;; All JSON arrays are parsed as vectors (:array-type 'array).\n\n;;; Code:\n\n(require 'cl-lib)\n(require 'url)\n(require 'url-http)\n(require 'json)\n(require 'opencode-log)\n(require 'opencode-util)\n\n(declare-function opencode-server-url \"opencode-server\" (&optional path))\n(declare-function opencode-server--url \"opencode-server\" (&optional path))\n(declare-function opencode-server-connected-p \"opencode-server\" ())\n(declare-function opencode-server--connected-p \"opencode-server\" ())\n\n(defvar opencode-default-directory)\n(defgroup opencode-api nil\n  \"OpenCode HTTP API client.\"\n  :group 'opencode\n  :prefix \"opencode-api-\")\n\n;;; --- Customization ---\n\n(defcustom opencode-api-directory nil\n  \"Override project directory for the X-OpenCode-Directory header.\nWhen nil, uses `opencode-default-directory' (set by `opencode-start')\nor falls back to `default-directory'.\"\n  :type '(choice (const :tag \"Use project directory\" nil)\n                 (directory :tag \"Fixed directory\"))\n  :group 'opencode-api)\n\n(defcustom opencode-api-timeout 30\n  \"HTTP request timeout in seconds.\"\n  :type 'integer\n  :group 'opencode-api)\n\n;;; --- Error condition ---\n\n(define-error 'opencode-api-error \"OpenCode API error\")\n\n(defun opencode-api--signal-error (status name message)\n  \"Signal an `opencode-api-error' with STATUS, NAME, and MESSAGE.\"\n  (signal 'opencode-api-error (list :status status :name name :message message)))\n\n;;; --- Sync cache+TTL macro ---\n\n(defmacro opencode--define-cache (cache-var cache-time-var\n                                  ttl-sym ttl-default\n                                  ensure-fn getter-fn\n                                  endpoint doc-noun error-prefix\n                                  &optional skip-defcustom)\n  \"Define a synchronous cache with TTL for ENDPOINT.\nCACHE-VAR and CACHE-TIME-VAR are the defvar symbols for cached data and\ntimestamp.  TTL-SYM names the TTL variable; when SKIP-DEFCUSTOM is nil a\ndefcustom with TTL-DEFAULT is generated, otherwise TTL-SYM is used as-is.\nENSURE-FN is the name of the ensure-cache function.\nGETTER-FN is the name of the getter function.\nENDPOINT is the API path string (e.g. \\\"/agent\\\").\nDOC-NOUN is a short description for docstrings (e.g. \\\"agent list\\\").\nERROR-PREFIX is the prefix for error messages (e.g. \\\"opencode-agent\\\").\"\n  (let ((ttl-doc (format \"Seconds before %s cache expires.\" doc-noun)))\n    `(progn\n       ;; --- cache variables ---\n       (defvar ,cache-var nil\n         ,(format \"Cached %s from GET %s.\" doc-noun endpoint))\n       (defvar ,cache-time-var nil\n         ,(format \"Float-time when %s cache was last populated.\" doc-noun))\n       ,@(unless skip-defcustom\n           `((defcustom ,ttl-sym ,ttl-default\n               ,ttl-doc\n               :type 'integer\n               :group 'opencode)))\n       ;; --- ensure + getter ---\n       (defun ,ensure-fn ()\n         ,(format \"Fetch %s if cache is nil or expired.\\nUpdates `%s' and\\n`%s'.\"\n                  doc-noun cache-var cache-time-var)\n         (let ((now (float-time)))\n           (when (or (null ,cache-var)\n                     (> (- now (or ,cache-time-var 0)) ,ttl-sym))\n             (condition-case err\n                 (let ((data (opencode-api-get-sync ,endpoint)))\n                   (setq ,cache-var data\n                         ,cache-time-var now))\n               (error\n                (message ,(format \"%s: failed to fetch %s: %%s\"\n                                  error-prefix doc-noun)\n                         (error-message-string err)))))))\n       (defun ,getter-fn ()\n         ,(format \"Return cached %s.\\nEnsures cache is populated first.\" doc-noun)\n         (,ensure-fn)\n         ,cache-var))))\n\n;;; --- Micro-cache (async-first, with :block/:cache/:callback) ---\n\n;; Two global caches: /agent and /config.\n;; Default behavior: return cache if available, kick off async refresh if\n;; stale/empty.  Callers that need guaranteed-fresh data use :block t\n;; (sync HTTP) or :callback fn (async HTTP, fn called with result).\n;; Callers that never want HTTP use :cache t (returns cache or nil).\n;;\n;; The :refreshing flag prevents duplicate in-flight requests.\n\n(defvar opencode-api--agents-cache nil\n  \"Cached agent list (vector of plists) from GET /agent.\")\n\n(defvar opencode-api--agents-refreshing nil\n  \"Non-nil while an async agent fetch is in flight.\")\n\n(defvar opencode-api--config-cache nil\n  \"Cached server config (plist) from GET /config.\")\n\n(defvar opencode-api--config-refreshing nil\n  \"Non-nil while an async config fetch is in flight.\")\n\n(cl-defun opencode-api--agents (&key block cache callback)\n  \"Return the cached agent list, optionally fetching from the server.\n\nModes (mutually exclusive — first match wins):\n\n  :cache t    — Return cache immediately.  Never HTTP.  May return nil.\n  :block t    — Synchronous HTTP if cache is nil.  Blocks Emacs.\n  :callback FN — Async HTTP if cache is nil.  FN called with result.\n                  Also returns current cache immediately.\n  (default)   — Return cache.  Kick off background refresh if nil.\n\nThe cache is invalidated by `opencode-api--agents-invalidate'.\"\n  (cond\n   (cache\n    opencode-api--agents-cache)\n   (block\n    (or opencode-api--agents-cache\n        (condition-case err\n            (let ((data (opencode-api-get-sync \"/agent\")))\n              (setq opencode-api--agents-cache data))\n          (error\n           (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: agents sync fetch failed: %s\"\n                            (error-message-string err))\n           nil))))\n   (callback\n    (if opencode-api--agents-cache\n        (funcall callback opencode-api--agents-cache)\n      (unless opencode-api--agents-refreshing\n        (setq opencode-api--agents-refreshing t)\n        (opencode-api-get\n         \"/agent\"\n         (lambda (response)\n           (setq opencode-api--agents-refreshing nil)\n           (when-let* ((body (plist-get response :body)))\n             (setq opencode-api--agents-cache body))\n           (funcall callback opencode-api--agents-cache)))))\n    opencode-api--agents-cache)\n   (t\n    (unless (or opencode-api--agents-cache opencode-api--agents-refreshing)\n      (setq opencode-api--agents-refreshing t)\n      (opencode-api-get\n       \"/agent\"\n       (lambda (response)\n         (setq opencode-api--agents-refreshing nil)\n         (when-let* ((body (plist-get response :body)))\n           (setq opencode-api--agents-cache body)))))\n    opencode-api--agents-cache)))\n\n(defun opencode-api--agents-invalidate ()\n  \"Clear the agent cache.  Next access re-fetches from server.\"\n  (setq opencode-api--agents-cache nil\n        opencode-api--agents-refreshing nil))\n\n(cl-defun opencode-api--server-config (&key block cache callback)\n  \"Return the cached server config, optionally fetching from the server.\n\nModes (mutually exclusive — first match wins):\n\n  :cache t    — Return cache immediately.  Never HTTP.  May return nil.\n  :block t    — Synchronous HTTP if cache is nil.  Blocks Emacs.\n  :callback FN — Async HTTP if cache is nil.  FN called with result.\n                  Also returns current cache immediately.\n  (default)   — Return cache.  Kick off background refresh if nil.\n\nThe cache is invalidated by `opencode-api--config-invalidate'.\"\n  (cond\n   (cache\n    opencode-api--config-cache)\n   (block\n    (or opencode-api--config-cache\n        (condition-case err\n            (let ((data (opencode-api-get-sync \"/config\")))\n              (setq opencode-api--config-cache data))\n          (error\n           (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: config sync fetch failed: %s\"\n                            (error-message-string err))\n           nil))))\n   (callback\n    (if opencode-api--config-cache\n        (funcall callback opencode-api--config-cache)\n      (unless opencode-api--config-refreshing\n        (setq opencode-api--config-refreshing t)\n        (opencode-api-get\n         \"/config\"\n         (lambda (response)\n           (setq opencode-api--config-refreshing nil)\n           (when-let* ((body (plist-get response :body)))\n             (setq opencode-api--config-cache body))\n           (funcall callback opencode-api--config-cache)))))\n    opencode-api--config-cache)\n   (t\n    (unless (or opencode-api--config-cache opencode-api--config-refreshing)\n      (setq opencode-api--config-refreshing t)\n      (opencode-api-get\n       \"/config\"\n       (lambda (response)\n         (setq opencode-api--config-refreshing nil)\n         (when-let* ((body (plist-get response :body)))\n           (setq opencode-api--config-cache body)))))\n    opencode-api--config-cache)))\n\n(defun opencode-api--config-invalidate ()\n  \"Clear the config cache.  Next access re-fetches from server.\"\n  (setq opencode-api--config-cache nil\n        opencode-api--config-refreshing nil))\n\n;;; --- JSON helpers ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--json-parse (string)\n  \"Parse JSON STRING to a plist.\nReturns nil if STRING is empty or nil.\"\n  (when (and string (not (string-empty-p (string-trim string))))\n    (opencode--json-parse string)))\n\n(defun opencode-api--json-serialize (object)\n  \"Serialize OBJECT (plist or vector) to a JSON string.\"\n  (json-serialize object))\n\n;;; --- URL construction ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--build-url (path &optional query-params)\n  \"Build a full URL from PATH and optional QUERY-PARAMS.\nPATH is appended to the server base URL.\nQUERY-PARAMS is an alist of (KEY . VALUE) pairs.\"\n  (let ((base (opencode-server--url path)))\n    (if query-params\n        (concat base\n                (if (string-search \"?\" base) \"&\" \"?\")\n                (url-build-query-string\n                 (mapcar (lambda (pair)\n                           (list (car pair) (cdr pair)))\n                         query-params)))\n      base)))\n\n;;; --- Header construction ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--build-headers (&optional extra-headers)\n  \"Build HTTP request headers.\nAlways includes Content-Type and Accept as JSON.\nIncludes X-OpenCode-Directory header.\nEXTRA-HEADERS is an alist of additional headers.\"\n  (let ((headers (list (cons \"Content-Type\" \"application/json\")\n                       (cons \"Accept\" \"application/json\"))))\n    ;; Add directory header - ensure we use absolute path\n    (let ((dir (or opencode-api-directory\n                   (and (boundp 'opencode-default-directory) opencode-default-directory)\n                   default-directory)))\n      (when dir\n        (let ((absolute-dir (directory-file-name (expand-file-name dir))))\n          (push (cons \"X-OpenCode-Directory\" absolute-dir) headers)\n          (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: using X-OpenCode-Directory=%s\" absolute-dir))))\n    ;; Merge extra headers\n    (when extra-headers\n      (dolist (h extra-headers)\n        (push h headers)))\n    headers))\n\n;;; --- Response parsing ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--parse-response-buffer ()\n  \"Parse HTTP response from current `url.el' response buffer.\nReturns a plist (:status STATUS :headers HEADERS :body BODY).\nBODY is the parsed JSON, or nil if empty/unparseable.\"\n  (goto-char (point-min))\n  (let ((status (url-http-parse-response))\n        (headers nil)\n        (body nil))\n    ;; Parse headers\n    (when (bound-and-true-p url-http-end-of-headers)\n      (save-excursion\n        (goto-char (point-min))\n        (while (re-search-forward \"^\\\\([^:]+\\\\): \\\\(.+\\\\)$\" url-http-end-of-headers t)\n          (push (cons (downcase (match-string 1)) (match-string 2)) headers)))\n      ;; Parse body\n      (goto-char url-http-end-of-headers)\n      (let ((body-str (string-trim\n                       (buffer-substring-no-properties (point) (point-max)))))\n        (condition-case nil\n            (setq body (opencode-api--json-parse body-str))\n          (error\n           ;; If JSON parse fails, keep raw string if non-empty\n           (unless (string-empty-p body-str)\n             (setq body body-str))))))\n    (list :status status :headers (nreverse headers) :body body)))\n\n;;; --- Error handling ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--handle-error (response)\n  \"Check RESPONSE for errors and signal if found.\nRESPONSE is a plist from `opencode-api--parse-response-buffer'.\nOpenCode errors have format: {:name \\\"ErrorName\\\" :data {:name ... :message ...}}\"\n  (let ((status (plist-get response :status))\n        (body (plist-get response :body)))\n    (when (and status (>= status 400))\n      (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: !!! ERROR status=%d raw-body=%S\" status body)\n      (let ((err-name \"UnknownError\")\n            (err-message (format \"HTTP %d\" status)))\n        ;; Try to extract OpenCode NamedError\n        (when (and (listp body) (plist-get body :name))\n          (setq err-name (plist-get body :name))\n          (let ((data (plist-get body :data)))\n            (when (and (listp data) (plist-get data :message))\n              (setq err-message (plist-get data :message)))))\n        (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: !!! signaling error name=%s message=%s\" err-name err-message)\n        (opencode-api--signal-error status err-name err-message)))))\n\n(defun opencode-api--debug-body (url body)\n  \"Format BODY for debug logging, omitting large responses.\nOmits body for /session/<id>/message and /agent endpoints\nwhose responses are too large for useful debug output.\"\n  (if (and url (or (string-match-p \"/session/[^/]+/message\" url)\n                   (string-match-p \"/agent\\\\(?:\\\\?\\\\|$\\\\)\" url)\n                   (string-match-p \"/session/[^/]+/diff\" url)))\n      \"[omitted]\"\n    (format \"%S\" body)))\n\n\n;;; --- Core request functions ---\n\n(defun opencode-api--request (method path &optional body callback headers query-params)\n  \"Make an HTTP request to the OpenCode API.\nMETHOD is \\\"GET\\\", \\\"POST\\\", \\\"PATCH\\\", or \\\"DELETE\\\".\nPATH is the API path (e.g., \\\"/session\\\").\nBODY is an optional plist to serialize as JSON.\nCALLBACK is called with the parsed response plist (:status :headers :body).\n  If nil, the request is synchronous and returns the response.\nHEADERS is an optional alist of extra headers.\nQUERY-PARAMS is an optional alist of (KEY . VALUE) pairs for URL query string.\"\n   (let* ((is-mutating (member method '(\"POST\" \"PATCH\" \"DELETE\")))\n         (serialized-body (when is-mutating\n                            (if body\n                                (opencode-api--json-serialize body)\n                              \"{}\")))\n         (url-request-method method)\n         (url-request-extra-headers (opencode-api--build-headers headers))\n         (url-request-data (when serialized-body\n                             (encode-coding-string serialized-body 'utf-8)))\n         (full-url (opencode-api--build-url path query-params)))\n     (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: >>> %s %s dir=%s\\nBody: %s\"\n              method full-url\n              (cdr (assoc \"X-OpenCode-Directory\" url-request-extra-headers))\n              (or serialized-body \"nil\"))\n    (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: >>> HEADERS: %S\" url-request-extra-headers)\n    (if callback\n        ;; Async — with timeout guard\n        (let* ((url-buf nil)\n               (timeout-timer\n                (run-with-timer\n                 opencode-api-timeout nil\n                 (lambda ()\n                   (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: <<< ASYNC TIMEOUT %s\" full-url)\n                   (when (and url-buf (buffer-live-p url-buf))\n                     (with-current-buffer url-buf\n                       ;; Kill the connection to trigger the callback with error\n                       (when-let ((proc (get-buffer-process (current-buffer))))\n                         (delete-process proc))))))))\n          (setq url-buf\n                (url-retrieve\n                 full-url\n                 (lambda (status cb url tmr)\n                   (cancel-timer tmr)\n                   (if (plist-get status :error)\n                       (let ((err (plist-get status :error)))\n                         (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: <<< ASYNC ERROR %s -> %S\" url err)\n                         (funcall cb (list :status 0\n                                           :headers nil\n                                           :body nil\n                                           :error err\n                                           :url url)))\n                     (let ((response (opencode-api--parse-response-buffer)))\n                      (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: <<< ASYNC %s -> status=%d body=%s\"\n                               url (plist-get response :status)\n                               (opencode-api--debug-body url (plist-get response :body)))\n                       (kill-buffer (current-buffer))\n                       (funcall cb response))))\n                 (list callback full-url timeout-timer)\n                 t\n                 nil)))\n      ;; Sync\n      (let ((buf (url-retrieve-synchronously\n                  full-url t nil opencode-api-timeout)))\n        (if buf\n            (unwind-protect\n                (with-current-buffer buf\n                  (let ((response (opencode-api--parse-response-buffer)))\n                    (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: <<< SYNC %s -> status=%d body=%s\"\n                             full-url (plist-get response :status)\n                             (opencode-api--debug-body full-url (plist-get response :body)))\n                    (opencode-api--handle-error response)\n                    response))\n              (kill-buffer buf))\n          (opencode-api--signal-error 0 \"ConnectionError\"\n                                      (format \"No response from %s\" full-url)))))))\n\n;;; --- Convenience wrappers (async, callback-based) ---\n\n(defun opencode-api-get (path callback &optional query-params)\n  \"GET PATH with optional QUERY-PARAMS, call CALLBACK with response.\"\n  (opencode-api--request \"GET\" path nil callback nil query-params))\n\n(defun opencode-api-post (path body callback)\n  \"POST BODY to PATH, call CALLBACK with response.\"\n  (opencode-api--request \"POST\" path body callback))\n\n(defun opencode-api-patch (path body callback)\n  \"PATCH BODY to PATH, call CALLBACK with response.\"\n  (opencode-api--request \"PATCH\" path body callback))\n\n(defun opencode-api-delete (path callback)\n  \"DELETE PATH, call CALLBACK with response.\"\n  (opencode-api--request \"DELETE\" path nil callback))\n\n;;; --- Synchronous convenience wrappers ---\n\n(defun opencode-api-get-sync (path &optional query-params)\n  \"Synchronous GET PATH with optional QUERY-PARAMS.\nReturns the response body (parsed JSON).\"\n  (plist-get (opencode-api--request \"GET\" path nil nil nil query-params) :body))\n\n(defun opencode-api-post-sync (path &optional body)\n  \"Synchronous POST BODY to PATH.\nReturns the response body (parsed JSON).\"\n  (plist-get (opencode-api--request \"POST\" path body) :body))\n\n;;; --- Agent/model state for prompt_async ---\n\n(defvar opencode-api--model-id nil\n  \"Current model ID for prompt_async requests.\")\n\n(defvar opencode-api--provider-id nil\n  \"Current provider ID for prompt_async requests.\")\n\n(declare-function opencode-agent--find-by-name \"opencode-agent\" (name))\n(declare-function opencode-agent--primary-agents \"opencode-agent\" ())\n\n(defun opencode-api--fetch-agent-info ()\n  \"Populate model/provider state from /config asynchronously.\nKicks off async fetches for both /agent and /config caches.\nSets `opencode-api--model-id' and `opencode-api--provider-id'\nwhen the config response arrives.  Never blocks Emacs.\"\n  (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: fetching agent info (async)...\")\n  (opencode-api--agents)\n  (opencode-api--server-config\n   :callback\n   (lambda (config)\n     (when config\n       (let ((model-str (plist-get config :model)))\n         (when (and model-str (string-match \"\\\\`\\\\(.+\\\\)/\\\\(.+\\\\)\\\\'\" model-str))\n           (setq opencode-api--provider-id (match-string 1 model-str)\n                 opencode-api--model-id (match-string 2 model-str))\n           (opencode--debug \"opencode-api: model=%s provider=%s\"\n                            opencode-api--model-id opencode-api--provider-id)))))))\n\n(defun opencode-api--valid-agent-p (agent-name)\n  \"Return non-nil if AGENT-NAME is a valid agent known to the server.\nChecks against the agent cache.  If the cache is empty, ensures it first.\"\n  (opencode-agent--find-by-name agent-name))\n\n(defun opencode-api--prompt-body (text &optional agent model-id provider-id\n                                       variant mentions images message-id context)\n  \"Build the POST body for /session/:id/prompt_async.\nTEXT is the user's message text.\nAGENT, MODEL-ID, PROVIDER-ID, VARIANT are optional overrides.\nWhen nil, uses global defaults from opencode-api--*.\nMENTIONS is an optional list of mention plists, each with :type, :name,\n:path (for files), :start, and :end (positions in TEXT).\nWhen MENTIONS is non-nil, additional file/agent parts are included.\nWhen VARIANT is non-nil, includes :variant in output plist.\nIMAGES is an optional list of image plists, each with :data-url, :mime,\nand :filename.  When non-nil, file parts with data: URLs are appended\nafter text and mention parts.\nMESSAGE-ID is the optional parent message ID.\nCONTEXT is an optional plist with :filename and :selection.\nReturns a plist with :parts, :agent, :model, :variant, :messageID, :context.\"\n  (let* ((text-part (list :type \"text\" :text text :id (opencode-util--generate-id \"prt\")))\n         (mention-parts\n          (when mentions\n            (mapcar\n             (lambda (m)\n               (let ((mtype (plist-get m :type))\n                     (mname (plist-get m :name))\n                     (mpath (plist-get m :path))\n                     (mstart (plist-get m :start))\n                     (mend (plist-get m :end)))\n                 (pcase mtype\n                   ('file\n                    (list :type \"file\"\n                          :id (opencode-util--generate-id \"prt\")\n                          :mime \"text/plain\"\n                          :url (concat \"file://\" mpath)\n                          :filename mname\n                          :source (list :type \"file\"\n                                        :text (list :value (substring text mstart mend)\n                                                    :start mstart :end mend)\n                                        :path mpath)))\n                   ('agent\n                    (list :type \"agent\"\n                          :id (opencode-util--generate-id \"prt\")\n                          :name mname\n                          :source (list :value (substring text mstart mend)\n                                        :start mstart :end mend))))))\n             mentions)))\n         (image-parts (when images\n                        (mapcar\n                         (lambda (img)\n                           (list :type \"file\"\n                                 :id (opencode-util--generate-id \"prt\")\n                                 :mime (plist-get img :mime)\n                                 :url (plist-get img :data-url)\n                                 :filename (plist-get img :filename)))\n                         images)))\n         (all-parts (apply #'vector (cons text-part (append (or mention-parts nil) (or image-parts nil)))))\n         (body (list :parts all-parts)))\n    ;; Agent: caller must provide (via opencode-chat--effective-agent)\n    (when agent\n      (setq body (plist-put body :agent agent)))\n    ;; Use provided model/provider or fall back to global defaults\n    (let ((effective-model-id (or model-id opencode-api--model-id))\n          (effective-provider-id (or provider-id opencode-api--provider-id)))\n      (when (and effective-model-id effective-provider-id)\n        (setq body (plist-put body :model\n                              (list :modelID effective-model-id\n                                    :providerID effective-provider-id)))))\n    ;; Include variant only if non-nil\n    (when variant\n      (setq body (plist-put body :variant variant)))\n    ;; Include messageID (parent) only if non-nil\n    (when message-id\n      (setq body (plist-put body :messageID message-id)))\n    ;; Include context only if non-nil\n    (when context\n      (setq body (plist-put body :context context)))\n    body))\n\n(provide 'opencode-api)\n;;; opencode-api.el ends here\n","additions":145,"deletions":17}]}}}
# --- Assertions ---
:assert-busy
